headline: Hubbell (HUBB) Completes $3 Billion NSI Industries Acquisition
summary: Hubbell (NYSE:HUBB) has completed its $3b acquisition of NSI Industries. The deal significantly expands Hubbell's electrical product portfolio. The transaction also broadens the company's distribution reach across key end markets. Hubbell enters this transaction with shares at $483.89 and a track record of multi year returns, including 18.0% over the past year and 166.1% over five years. For investors following NYSE:HUBB, the completed NSI Industries acquisition is a development in...
